# 04-Upload a chart [POST]

`POST /api/v4/projects/{id}/packages/helm/api/{channel}/charts`

Uploads a specified chart for a project.

### Parameters

| Name | Type | In | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `any` | `path` | Yes | The ID or full path of a project |
| `channel` | `string` | `path` | Yes | Helm channel |

### Request Body (multipart/form-data)

```json
{
  "chart": string (required), // The chart file to be published (generated by Multipart middleware)
}
```
### Responses

#### 201 - Created

#### 400 - Bad Request

#### 401 - Unauthorized

#### 403 - Forbidden

#### 404 - Not Found
